title: Bay Breeze Escape
subtitle: Kayak + Luxury Picnic Experience
description: Guided or self-paced kayak session followed by a styled picnic setup (pillows, blankets, décor). Includes a charcuterie board and sparkling drinks.

title: Sunset & Bubbles
subtitle: Golden Hour Luxury Picnic
description: Fully styled coastal picnic with a charcuterie board, sparkling beverages, and a curated playlist via Bluetooth speaker. Perfect golden hour photo-ready setup.

title: S'mores & Stories Night
subtitle: Firepit Experience Under the Stars
description: Firepit setup with cozy seating, a s'mores bar, hot cocoa, lantern lighting, and soft music.

title: Bay Reset
subtitle: Relax & Recharge Experience
description: Guided yoga or stretch session by the water, followed by an herbal tea service and quiet journaling time.
